deleteModal.title: Delete products
deleteModal.salesWarning: Some selected products already have sales. Deleting them may affect product lists, reports, and forecasting.

mergeModal.title: Merge products
mergeModal.tip: Tip: select products in the table, then click "Merge selected". Choose the cleanest product name as the primary one, and add the duplicate or misspelled names on the other side.

table.selectPage: Select all products on this page

page.title: Products
page.subtitle: Search, filter, merge, and delete products.
page.warnMergeMinTwo: Select at least 2 products to merge.
page.warnMergeChoose: Choose a primary product and at least 1 product to merge into it.
page.redirectCompletedWithFile: “{{fileName}}” is already completed, so we brought you to Products. You can view and manage the products imported from that file here.
page.redirectCompleted: This upload is already completed, so we brought you to Products. You can view and manage the imported products here.

help.title: How to use Products

reviewProducts.title: 1. Review extracted products
reviewProducts.description: This page shows the products AIMOPS found from uploaded sales data, including category, sales count, revenue, and last sale date.

useFilters.title: 2. Use filters to find products
useFilters.description: Search by product name, filter by category, filter products that need review, or narrow the list by last sale date.

checkReview.title: 3. Check products that need review
checkReview.description: Rows marked as Needs review may contain possible duplicates, spelling issues, or unusual product names that should be checked.

mergeDuplicates.title: 4. Merge duplicate products
mergeDuplicates.description: Select two or more products, then use Merge selected. Choose the main product that should stay, and merge the duplicate names into it.

deleteCarefully.title: 5. Delete carefully
deleteCarefully.description: Deleting products can affect product lists, reports, and forecasting. Products with sales history require extra caution.

help.note: Tip: Clean product names make reports and forecasts more accurate, especially when the same product appears with different spellings.
